description_long: This is a rugged, low-cut work or hiking shoe featuring a robust synthetic and mesh upper in shades of gray and olive. The shoe has a reinforced toe cap, likely steel, for added protection, and a thick, textured rubber sole designed for durability and traction. The upper includes mesh panels for breathability, with chevron-shaped reflective or light-colored accents on the sides. The lacing system is a standard criss-cross style with round laces, and the collar is padded for comfort, with an orange lining visible at the opening. The heel has a pull tab for easy wearing, and the overall build suggests it is intended for heavy-duty or outdoor use.
description: A sturdy, gray and olive work or hiking shoe with a reinforced toe, mesh panels, and a thick, textured sole. Features include criss-cross lacing, padded collar, and reflective side accents.
description_view_0: Side view showing the chevron accents, mesh panels, and reinforced toe cap.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the padded collar, orange lining, and heel pull tab.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with similar mesh and chevron details, and visible sole thickness.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the lacing system, steel toe marking, and toe cap prominence.
